title: CashApp TikTok Creative Strategy
summary: Helping CashApp build an expansive world on TikTok
body: Over six months, my TikTok Creative Lab team worked directly with Cash App's creative and business leadership to map out a TikTok-native brand world. The throughline was simple: stop selling features, start building a vibe. We pushed the team to embrace vibes-based brand building (the emerging model where brands stand out by feel rather than by claim) and showed them how to construct a world that earns relevance with niche audiences at scale rather than chasing the masses. We laid out a partner strategy too, pulling apart the nuances between celebrity-led and creator-led activations so each collaboration would feel native to both audiences.

The first vibes-based flagship was Cash App's Timothée Chalamet film, a two-minute spot that premiered before opening-weekend showings of Superman and seeded an Easter-egg launch online (Cash App even deposited $25 into select Chalamet fans' accounts so they could go see the movie). The piece doesn't sell. It vibes. It targets Gen Z through cultural differentiation rather than feature comparison, with a subconscious throughline of financial responsibility. As Chalamet put it:

body.text: Financial literacy across all age groups is important and this spot seeks to emphasize that.

body: From there, the world expanded. The Please Don't Destroy long-form partnership became Cash App's most-liked social post to date, with viewers coming for the humor and staying for the product demo, then sharing it widely because it was such a big swing for a financial brand. The Please Don't Destroy trio fits within Cash App's, and parent company Block's, broader strategy to make finance, or the 'vibe' of money, humorous and engaging. The final pillar was niche audiences at scale: a collaboration with celebrity astrologer Aliza Kelly (145K TikTok followers, 4.1M likes) connecting astrology to financial guidance and unlocking a previously untapped community for the brand.
Allbriton Robbins - Creative Strategy Director, TikTok Creative Lab
TikTok Creative Lab - Brand world development for Cash App
